name: Boydesque Brew
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ingredients in a saucepan and bring to a simmer.
2. Reduce heat to low and cook until onions are tender and mixture thickens, 25 to 30 minutes.
3. Refrigerate sauce overnight to allow flavors to mingle and mellow.
4. Use sauce warm or chilled; it keeps refrigerated for up to two weeks.
